hero.title: Margaux
hero.subtitle: UX/UI Designer & Developer
hero.description: I create digital experiences that combine thoughtful design with technical execution.

formationSorbonne.title: About the program
formationSorbonne.description: This project was completed as part of my <1>Professional Bachelor's in Web Development</1> at Sorbonne Université. This program gave me strong foundations in front-end development and introduced me to UX principles.

formationIIM.title: About the program
formationIIM.description: This project was completed as part of my <1>Master's in UX & UI Design</1> at IIM Digital School. This specialized program allowed me to deepen my skills in user research, interface design, and design thinking.
